generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T COBALTUM. The element, Co. Preparation , Trituration of the pure metal. Authorities. 1 , Dr. C. Hering, monograph, Phila., 1866; 2 , Dr. S. Jones, provings with 1st trit., repeated doses, from same monograph and from Sparhawk's provings, Phila. J. of Hom., 2, 449; 3 , Noah Koller, from Hering; 4 a , A. Lippe's first proving, 1st trit., Sparhawk's provings; 4 b , same 2d trit.; 5 a , Sparhawk's proving, 1st trit., repeated doses; 5 b , same, 2d trit.; 5 c , same, 30th dil.; 5 d , same, 50th dil. MIND. ► Emotional. ► Great exhilaration of spirits during the day (third day), [5d] . ► Great vivacity (fifth day), [5d] . ► Great vivacity and rapid flow of thought, [5a] . ► Low-spirited; thinks too little of himself, [3] . ► Condemned, mean feeling, as though guilty of some deed of which others knew; as if he could not look one in the face (after the fourth dose), 6 A.M., and several times during the day (third day), [2] . ► *All mental excitement greatly increases the suffering (1st dil.), [1] . ► Intellectual. ► Desire for study (second day), [5c] . ► Increased desire for study (third day), [5d] . ► Much more inclination to study, [4b] . [10.] ► Indisposed to mental or physical labor; want of energy; low-spirited; thinks too little of himself, [3] . ► Dulness and weakness, with aversion to mental exercise (after nine hours), [5a] . HEAD. ► Dulness and fulness, with bruised pain in the head, especially in the forehead and temples; morning (second day), [3] . ► Head feels dull and stupid, with a dull pressive pain in temples, which was worse on moving; forenoon (second day), [3] . ► Pain in the head (second day), [2] . ► Pain in head, worse when bending forward, especially the occiput (second day), [5c] . ► Pain in head and small of back (second day), [5c] . ► Pain in head, especially occiput, at the middle of the day (second day), [5c] . ► Feeling as if head grew large during stool, with dizziness and weakness; pain in head continued for an hour after stool (after six hours), [5b] . ► Dull aching pain in head from 1 till 8 P.M., increasing till then, mostly in forehead (third day), [5c] . [20.] ► Headache in morning, with beating, and sore aching all over (seventh day), [5c] . ► Headache, in morning when rising (second day), [5d] . ► Headache, on waking and during the day (third day), [2] . ► Headache all forenoon (second day), [5c] . ► Headache at 12, with nausea and languor (second day), [5d] . ► On walking, headache, [2] . ► Slight headache for two days, in morning till 10 o'clock and again in afternoon (fourth day), [5c] . ► Slight headache in afternoon (fourth day), [5c] . ► Slight headache in room, going off in open air (soon after), [5c] . ► Dull headache all day, from waking in the morning, worse in a room (second day), [2] . [30.] ► Dull headache, especially in forehead, with a feeling in stomach as if it contained undigested food (third day), [5a] . ► Sensation as if the brain went up and down, when stepping (seventh day), [5c] . ► Forehead. ► Pain in forehead (sixth day), [5d] . ► Pain in forehead, after rising (second day), [5c] . ► Pain in forehead, worse from stooping (fourth day), [5d] . ► Pain in forehead, with pain in back part of eyes (after half an hour), [5c] . ► Pain in forehead, with sense of fulness at stomach, as if filled with air (third day), [5c] . ► Severe pain in forehead, soon after rising (second day), [5c] . ► Temples. ► Severe pain in temples (after one hour), [5d] . ► Pain in left temple during morning, with feeling of languor and nausea at stomach; constant desire for stool, and sensation as if diarrha would set in, but it did not (second day), [5d] . [40.] ► Pain, like a tearing, in the right temple near to the orbit; forenoon (first day), [3] . ► Vertex. ► Pain in top of head, when rising from a seat, with prickling pain in stomach (third day), [5b] . ► The top of the head at every jar feels as if it would come off (seventh day), [5c] . ► Occiput. ► Pain in occiput, in morning (fifth day), [5d] . ► Headache in occiput (second day), [5c] . ► Headache in occiput in morning, worse in open air; continuing till 3 P.M. (second day), [5d] . ► Headache in occiput, coming on at noon, [5d] . ► External Head. ► Pimples, very sore, like a boil in the edge of the hair on the back of the head (third day), [5d] . ► Great itching of hairy scalp at night (second day), [5c] . ► Great itching of the hairy scalp, and in the beard under the chin, with burning when scratching (second day), [5c] . EYE. [50.] ► The eyes, which were previously weak, and the lids red and tender, are much aggravated, with sensation as if sand were under the lid (third day), [2] . ► Eyes dry, [2] . ► Pain in the eyes during the day and evening, [5b] . ► Pain in eyes, when coming to the light (third day), [5c] . ► Aching pain in eyes, when writing (after twenty-one hours and a half), [5d] . ► Fine dartings in eyes when writing, with feeling, when opening the lids, as if little strings were holding them together and were snapping, [5b] . ► Darting pain in eyes, on coming into the light from a room, at 2.30 P.M., in bright sunshine (third day), [5a] . ► Shooting pain in eyes, on coming to outdoor light from a room (third day), [5b] . ► Eyes smart in light (ninth day), [5d] . [60.] ► Smarting pain in left corner of left eye, as from hot water, with severe pain in top of head (third day), [5c] . ► Severe smarting pain in eyes when writing, with almost loss of vision (second day), [5c] . ► Eyes worse in open air (third day), [2] . ► Lids. ► Lids smooth, forming scales on the upper lid (third day), [2] . ► Sensation as if something were under the upper lid, obliging him to rub it (sixth day), [2] . ► Pain and smarting in upper eyelids as soon as he looks at anything steadily (second day), [5c] . ► A good deal of burning in lids, [2] . ► Smarting in eyelids (sixth day), [5c] . ► A good deal of burning in lids, [2] . ► Smarting in eyelids (sixth day), [5d] . ► Smarting of eyelids as soon as he begins to use them (third day), [5c] . ► Smarting pain on inner side of upper lids (second day), [5c] . [70.] ► Smarting pain in eyelids, in evening (third day), [5d] . ► Lachrymal Apparatus. ► Lachrymation and pain in eyes, especially in cold air (second day), [5c] . ► Profuse lachrymation in open air, with water from nose, [5c] . ► Ball. ► Some pain in ball (third day), [2] . ► Vision. ► Flickering before the eyes (muscæ volitantes), dimness of sight; while reading, the letters look blurred (three hours after 1st dil.), [3] . EAR. ► Aching pain in left ear (ninth day), [5d] . ► Aching pain in left ear in evening (sixth day), [5d] . ► Aching pain in left ear (like slight humming), (second day), [5d] . ► Aching-beating pain in left ear, in evening (fourth day), [5d] . ► Hearing. ► Humming in left ear (seventh day), [5d] . NOSE. [80.] ► Thin discharge from the nose and occasional sneezing (second day); symptoms of a cold continue (third day), [2] . ► Feeling as if of a cold in the head (second day), [2] . ► Nose feels dry and filled up with dry scales, with itching, especially of left nostril (second day), [5c] . ► Nose feels as if obstructed with mucus (second day), [5c] . ► Stitching of left side of nose at the angle; it burns on being scratched (second day), [5c] . ► A very sensitive spot on the nose, at the termination of the cartilage, being very painful on pressure, four following days, [3] . ► Smell. ► Putrid sickish smell before the nose (second day), [5d] . FACE. ► Peeling of the lips, and soreness; they bleed easily, [5d] . MOUTH. ► Teeth. ► Pain in hollow tooth, which feels too long; sensitive to touch , [5d] . ► Pain in hollow tooth (first molar of lower jaw, left side), with swelling of the gums, and great tenderness around it; worse from inhaling cold air; feels as if it would ulcerate, [5c] . [90.] ► Pain and soreness of hollow tooth; feels as if too long for a while, and then goes off again (second day), [5c] . ► Paroxysms of pain in the hollow tooth (second day), [5c] . ► Tongue. ► Tongue white (second day), [5d] . ► Tongue coated while (second day), [5c] . ► Tongue coated white, with cracks across the middle (second day), [15] . ► Tongue covered with a thick white coat , [5d] . ► Very thick white mucus on tongue, with flat, mucous taste (third day), [5c] . ► General Mouth. ► Sore on left side of mouth, opposite stomach tooth (sixth day), [5d] . ► Pricking in roof of mouth, as from a pain (after half an hour), [5c] . ► Stinging pain in roof of mouth, extending through to left ear (second day), [5c] . ► Saliva. [100.] ► Much saliva accumulates (third day), [5c] . ► Water accumulates in mouth, with frequent swallowing (after one hour and second day), [5c] . ► Constant secretion of water in mouth, and swallowing (second day), [5d] . ► Taste. ► Flat taste (second day), [5c] . ► Flat taste in mouth, and rising of sour water, which has an acrid feeling in throat (second day), [5c] . ► Nauseous, flat taste in morning (third day), [5b] . ► Flat mucous taste in mouth (second day), [5c] . ► Bad mucous taste in mouth (second day), [5d] . ► Bad taste in the mouth, with belching of wind; morning (second day), [3] . ► Sweet taste of mucus, with expectoration of thick, white, frothy mucus, with lumps in it (second day), [5c] . THROAT. ► Objective. [110.] ► Throat filled with mucus in the morning (third day), [5b] . ► Throat filled with white mucus (second day), [5d] . ► Hawking of lumpy mucus in morning, [2] . ► Hawking and spitting of mucus in the morning, first of lumps and then thinner (third day), [2] . ► Uncomfortable feeling in the throat, with pain on empty swallowing and gaping (second day), [5a] . ► Dry throat, when rising (third day), [5d] . ► Throat dry and sore, feeling as if raw, [5d] . ► Throat feels dry and sore on swallowing, feeling as if something dry had collected in it, on rising in morning (second day), [5c] . ► Sensation as if something sticks in throat, causing him to hawk, which makes it feel sore (second day), [5c] . ► Heat rising in throat, as if from stomach, [5c] . [120.] ► Sore throat in morning, when hawking (ninth and tenth days), [5d] . ► Soreness of throat when hawking, as if raw (fourth day), [5d] . ► Sore raw feeling in throat, when hawking (fifth day), [5d] . ► Frequent desire to swallow, with accumulation of water in mouth (second day), [5c] . ► *After discharging phlegm from the throat he feels generally much relieved, [1] . ► External Throat. ► Drawing pain in left submaxillary gland (second day), [5d] . STOMACH. ► Appetite. ► Appetite somewhat diminished (third and sixth days), [2] . ► Not much desire for food; ate lightly at dinner, [5b] . ► No appetite (second day), [5d] . ► No appetite for supper (second day), [5c] . [130.] ► No appetite for supper (ate none), (second day), [5d] . ► Eructations and Hiccough. ► Much rising of wind from stomach (third day), [5d] . ► Belching of wind (after six hours), [5b] . ► Rising of sour water from stomach, [5c] . ► Rising of bitter water in mouth, an hour after dinner (third day), [5c] . ► Rising of bitter water, with pain in stomach, and afterwards dryness of throat (after one hour), [5c] . ► Rising of hot bitter water, in the afternoon (third day), [5c] . ► Gulping up of sour, bitter water, [5c] . ► Hiccough after dinner (second day), [5c] . ► Gulping up of sour, bitter water, [5c] . ► Hiccough after dinner (second day), [5a] . ► Hiccough set in soon after dinner, and continued without cessation till 6 P.M.; after supper, again renewed, [5a] . [140.] ► Attack of hiccough, with shooting pain in forehead till midnight (after one hour), [5a] . ► Nausea. ► Nausea at stomach, with pain in forehead (after one hour), [5a] . ► Stomach. ► Sour stomach, with headache, as if it would burst; in evening, after supper, had to lid down; 11 P.M., increases in severity; an hour after, watery diarrha, with tenesmus; sour taste, with nausea, remained till sleep (fifth day), [5c] . ► Pain in stomach (after one hour), [5c] . ► Pain in stomach and abdomen (fourth day), [5d] . ► Pain in stomach, one hour after rising, with headache (second day), [5c] . ► Pain in stomach after eating, especially after dinner, with pain in the abdomen, worse by pressure, and feeling of great uneasiness; had to move about, as if he could not keep still (second day), [5c] . ► Pain in stomach after a meal (fourth day), [5d] . ► Pain in stomach after a light meal (ninth day), [5d] . ► Pain in stomach soon after dinner (fourth day), [5c] . [150.] ► Pain in stomach, with colic in abdomen and sensation as if diarrha would come on (second day), [5c] . ► Severe pain in stomach, as if from hunger, before dinner, which continues till dinner, and is partially relieved by eating (second day), [5c] . ► Sensation of fulness and hardness in stomach, as if filled with wind (third day), [5c] . ► Pressure in stomach, as if from wind (second day), [5d] . ► Soreness in pit of stomach, caused by the constant hiccough (after one hour), [5a] . ► Soreness in the region of the stomach on taking a deep inspiration, morning (second day), [3] . ABDOMEN. ► Hypochondria. ► Dull pain in the left hypochondrium, with sour eructations (third day), [3] . ► Feeling in left side, above spleen, as if it would drop down, worse when walking; disappears when sitting still (fourth day), [5d] . ► Sharp pain in the region of the spleen, worse on taking a deep inspiration (third day), [3] . ► Umbilical. ► Pain in umbilical region one hour after eating, worse from contracting the walls of the abdomen (second day), [5c] . ► General Abdomen. [160.] ► Rumbling in bowels (fourth day), [5d] . ► Loud rumbling in bowels (second day), [5d] . ► Feeling as if diarrha would come on, with rumbling in bowels (after five hours), [5b] . ► Strange but not unpleasant sensation in bowels, as after diarrha, [4] . ► Strange but not unpleasant sensation in the bowels, as after diarrha, all the time since the stool became more hard and natural, [4a] . ► Feeling of emptiness in abdomen, at the umbilicus (second day), [5d] . ► Pain in abdomen, in evening and at night (second day), [5d] . ► Pain, as from a fulness in abdomen, soon after a light dinner (second day), [5d] . ► Colic, on waking, at 5 A.M., then watery stool, with tenesmus (sixth day), [5c] . ► Colic during stool (fourth day), [5d] . [170.] ► Severe cutting colic before stool (second day), [5c] . ► Colic-pain at 4 A.M., better after a watery stool, having had no passage for two days (eighth day), [5c] . ► Hypogastrium and Iliac Regions. ► Yellow-brown spots on lower part of abdomen, about genitals (tenth day), [5d] . ► Severe colic in lower part of abdomen (after one hour), [5d] . ► Pain in abdomen, low down, in evening (second day), [5d] . ► Pain in left groin and small of back (sixth day), [5d] . RECTUM AND ANUS. ► Rectum. ► Burning in rectum during stool, and continuing long afterwards (second day), [5c] . ► Pressing in the rectum (second day), [5d] . ► Anus. ► During the whole day, constant dropping of blood from the anus, none with the stool; has often had some bloody marks on his fæces (first day), [1] . ► Pressure towards the anus, increasing till stool (second day), [5c] . ► Urging. [180.] ► Urgent desire for stool, with slight cutting in abdomen; while walking, desire worse than when standing still (after five hours), [4] . ► Tenesmus after stool (after six hours), [5b] . STOOL. ► Diarrha. ► Stool twice per day (before, only once), [5a] . ► A profuse stool, watery, spouting; in an hour, another stool (after five hours), [4] . ► Stool at 9 A.M. and at 9 P.M.; the former small and hard, the latter small, soft, painless (third day), [5d] . ► Soft diarrhic stool, with tenesmus and colic (second day), [5c] . ► Large stool, soft, thin (diarrhic), with much tenesmus, and severe colicky pain in lower part of abdomen during stool, as if the bowels would protrude, and aching pain in sphincter ani, which continued for an hour after stool (after six hours), [5b] . ► Stool at 4.30 P.M., soft, with stinging pain during and after for some time (second day), [5d] . ► Stool at 4.45 P.M., with cutting pain in abdomen before stool and pressing in rectum (fourth day), [5d] . ► Stool at 9 A.M., natural, but small in quantity (fourth day), [5c] . [190.] ► Stool more natural (third day), and becomes in a few days quite hard and natural, which has not been the case for three years, [4] . ► *Instead of several soft stools during the day, one well-formed in the evening (first day), [1] . ► Constipation. ► Small stool, with tenesmus, at 4 P.M. (second day), [5d] . ► Small hard stool (fifth day), [5d] . ► Stool at 4 P.M., small and hard (third day), [5d] . ► Stool small and hard, at 10 P.M., with sensation of scratching in rectum (second day), [5c] . ► Small, dry, hard, lumpy stool at 11 P.M. (third day), [5b] . ► Stool scanty and hard (after fourteen hours and a half), [5d] . ► No passage for two days, [5c] . URINARY ORGANS. ► Urethra. [200.] ► Pain in the urethra, with the emissions, [1] , [4] . ► Burning in urethra during micturition (second day), [5c] . ► Acute pain in the urethra while standing, with a bruised feeling in the back and loins towards the latter part of the day, [3] . ► Smarting in end of urethra during micturition, lasting but a short time after (second day), [5c] . ► Frequent desire to urinate, [5c] . ► Constant desire to urinate every twenty minutes, all the forenoon, after drinking coffee (earlier than usual), with discharge of much pale urine; continues for five days, always worse in forenoon (second day), [4] . ► Micturition. ► Urinates often and of smaller quantity (third day), [2] . ► Passes urine often and in small quantities (second day), [5c] . ► Passed much smaller quantity of urine, but often, every two hours; had to rise in the night to urinate (fourth day), [5a] . ► Frequent passing of small quantities of light-colored urine (third day), [5b] . [210.] ► Urine frequent and scanty, with flocculent sediment and strong pungent smell , [5d] . ► Scanty urine (fifth day), [5d] . ► Urine scanty and light-colored (second day), [5c] . ► Urine scanty, and greasy pellicle on it (second day), [5d] . ► Scanty urine, which after standing has a greasy pellicle on it (second day), [5d] . ► Less urine, and more saturated, [2] . ► Urine. ► Urine more yellow (fourth day), [5a] . ► Urine deep-red, with flocculent red sediment after standing (second day), [5c] . ► Greasy pellicle on the urine (seventh and eighth days); with yellow flocculent sediment (ninth day), [5d] . ► Sediment of yellow-red flocks in the urine, which are in little clots after two hours' standing (third day), [5c] . SEXUAL ORGANS. [220.] ► *Impotence and emissions without erections, [4] . ► Severe pain in the right testicle, continuing a few moments; better after passing urine, 10 A.M., three hours after second dose (second day), [2] . ► More sexual desire in the morning, [1] . ► Emissions with partial erections during sleep (fourth day), [5d] . ► Emissions without erections (eighth and ninth days), [5d] . ► During a nap in the evening, lying on his back on the sofa, seminal emission, with a dream unusually particular and vivid; in a married man of 50 years (first day), [1] . ► Awoke at 4 A.M. with pollution (second day), [5b] . ► *Seminal emissions at night, with headache, [1] , [4] . RESPIRATORY ORGANS. ► Larynx. ► Stitching pain in the larynx, in the front region, forenoon (first day), [3] . ► The pain in the larynx returned at 9.30 A.M., with a warm sensation through the whole body, and with flushes of beat and much perspiration, forenoon (second day), [3] . ► Cough and Expectoration. [230.] ► Coughing, with soreness of throat and rawness when hawking (seventh and eighth days), [5d] . ► Short hacking cough, with frequent expectoration of a quantity of red blood, which, from the sensation felt, comes from the larynx (fourth day), [3] . ► Expectoration of thick tough mucus, mixed with blood; scratching sensation in the throat, feeling also as if something had lodged in the throat, inducing swallowing, morning (third day), [3] . ► Copious expectoration of frothy white mucus with lumps in it, about 9 A.M. (fourth day), [5d] . ► Profuse expectoration, in morning, of white mucus, with little bubbles of air in it, worse in open air (fifth and tenth days), [5d] . ► Several mornings in succession, raising of much thick tough mucus, mixed with a considerable quantity of red blood, with a sensation of fulness and pressive pain in the larynx, accompanied by a sensation of scratching and rawness, with occasional burning pains and a disposition to keep the jaws closed tightly; the above sensations are increased by pressure, empty deglutition, and cold water (fourth and following days), [3] . ► Hawking and spitting of much thick white mucus (third day), [5a] . ► Respiration. ► Frequent sighing, [5d] . CHEST. ► Occasional deep stitches in the lower part of the chest, mostly on the left side, on taking a deep inspiration (third day), [2] . BACK. ► Pain in back, on sitting down after rising (second day), [5c] . [240.] ► Backache, as if he could not straighten himself (seventh day), [5c] . ► Backache, worse all morning (seventh day), [5c] . ► Backache, with seminal emissions, [1] , [4] . ► *Pain in the back, increasing while sitting (similar to Zincum), [4] . ► *Pain in the back while sitting, better on walking or lying down, [4] . ► Dorsal. ► An indefinite pain on either side of the dorsal spine, similar to that felt in the chest, when it is said "the food has lodged" (third day), [2] . ► Pain between shoulders, in lumbar region, and small of back (second day), [5c] . ► Lumbar. ► Pain in small of back when sitting, going off when rising and walking, or lying down (second day), [5c] . ► Severe pain in small of back, in evening (thirteenth day), [5d] . ► Severe pain in small of back, with pain in head, at 6 P.M. (second day), [5c] . [250.] ► Severe pain in small of back, after dinner, with aching pain in knees, and below (fourth day), [5a] . ► Severe pain in small of back, worse when sitting (second day), better when lying down (third day), [15] . ► Severe pain in small of back, partially relieved by lying down, not by standing (after twenty-one hour and a half), [5d] . ► Aching pain in small of back, felt most when sitting (second day), [5a] . ► Pain in the small of the back, always while sitting, [1] , [4] . EXTREMITIES IN GENERAL. ► Objective. ► Trembling of the limbs (fifth day), [5d] . ► Trembling of the limbs, especially the legs (third day), [5b] . ► Jerks in limbs, when falling asleep (after three hours), [5c] . ► Weakness and weariness of the limbs, [2] . ► Subjective. ► Great weariness of the limbs, from walking, [5c] . [260.] ► Bruised pains in the limbs, especially in the joints; morning (third day), [3] . ► Bruised pain in all the limbs, afternoon (first day), [3] . ► Stitching pains, here and there, in the arms, legs, etc., (third day), [3] . SUPERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Aching pain in the wrist-joints, with occasional stitches (third day), [3] . INFERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Tired feeling in legs (second day), [5a] . ► Aching in both legs, half way between thighs and knees, on the front side (in muscles), (second day), [5d] . ► Hip. ► Bruised pain in the left hip, in the region of the trochanter major, which was worse on motion, and better by rest, morning (third day), [3] . ► Thigh. ► Stitching-shooting pain from the region of the liver down to the thigh, 3 P.M. (first day), [3] . ► Knee. ► Weakness of knees, after exercise (fourth day), [5d] . ► Weakness of knees after a little exercise (second day), [5c] . [270.] ► Excessive weakness of the knees, as if they would not support him (second day), [5d] . ► Aching of knees and lower extremities (seventh day), [5c] . ► Aching in knees, with itching of skin on the external side, [5c] . GENERALITIES. ► Objective. ► Weakness of body, especially the limbs, (second day), [5d] . ► Had to lie down (after nine hours), [5a] . ► Restlessness, and go to sleep late, [5b] . ► Subjective. ► A very remarkable feeling of being unusually well (first and following days), [1] . ► Languor, in evening, with aching of knees (fifth day), [5d] . ► Languidness; disposition to lie down; flushes of heat along the legs (third day), [3] . ► Weak, weary feeling in the whole body, especially the limbs (second day), [2] . [280.] ► Soreness and bruised pain in the whole body; no disposition to move, morning (second day), [3] . ► Aching when sitting (third day), [5b] . ► Aching of the bones (second day), [5c] . SKIN. ► Objective. ► Eruptions, Dry. ► Pimples on back of left ear, near top (third day), [5d] . ► Number of painless pimples on nose second day), [5c] . ► Pimples on shoulders, pit of stomach, and buttocks, which bleed easily when scratched, [5c] . ► Pimples on the nates; they bleed when scratched (second day), [5c] . ► Eruptions, Moist. ► Appearance of vesicles on the right side of the neck, having an inflamed base, containing watery lymph, being sore to the touch, disappearing slowly, leaving tenderness for a long time afterwards (third day), [3] . ► Eruptions, Pustular. ► A boil begins on right side of chin, and suppurates (after ten days), [4b] . ► A small boil comes out on the right forearm, on which three weeks previous three had been several (fifth day), [2] . ► Subjective. [290.] ► Much itching, all over, when getting warm in bed, [5c] . ► Itching of left side of nose (after twenty-one hours and a half), [5d] . ► Intense itching of left side, internally, in evening (second day), [5c] . ► Much itching on the shoulders (second day), [5c] . SLEEP AND DREAMS. ► Sleepiness. ► Much yawning (fourth day), [5d] . ► Much yawning, all day (second day), [5c] . ► Frequent yawning (second day), [5d] . ► Incessant yawning (second and third days), [5c] . ► Gaping, after dinner; languid feeling of the whole body (fourth day), [3] . ► Great drowsiness, in the evenings, [3] . [300.] ► Position in sleep, bends head down on left arm, and sleeps on left side, while ordinarily on right side (fifth day), [5d] . ► Distressing drowsiness, in the evening, [1] . ► Sleeplessness. ► Wakefulness; can do with less sleep, [4b] . ► Difficulty in going to sleep (sixth day), [5d] . ► Cannot fall asleep, in the evening; but a few hours of sleep are satisfactory, and he wakes up early (30th potency), [1] . ► Falls into a light sleep, about 1 o'clock at night, with tossing about (after three hours), [5c] . ► Sleep disturbed, [5d] . ► Frequent waking with fright, could not tell for what (after three hours), [5c] . ► Sleepless, with lewd dreams when sleeping (unusual), [5b] . ► Sleep unrefreshing (third day), [5d] . [310.] ► When rising felt unrefreshed, as if he had not slept enough, morning (second day), [3] . ► Awake with wide-awake feeling (fifth day), [5d] . ► Awoke earlier than usual, at 6.30 A.M., with wide-awake feeling (second day), [5d] . ► *Unrefreshing sleep , [1] . ► *One formerly used to rise early, who now had for a week distressing drowsiness in the evening, slept from ten to eleven hours without intermission, all night, and was still hardly able to get up in the morning; after Cobaltum is immediately able to be up and awake in the evening, and rise at five o'clock in the morning, feeling as well as ever, [1] . ► Dreams. ► Sleep, with many dreams (second day), [5d] . ► Sleep disturbed by dreams, [2] ; (fourth day), [5d] . ► Sleep much disturbed by dreams, not vivid or remembered, but making sleep unrefreshing, causing headache, which lasted all day (third day), [2] . ► Lewd dreams, [5d] ; (after three hours), [5c] . ► Lewd dreams and emissions, [5c] . [320.] ► Sleep disturbed by lewd dreams , and frequent (three) copious emissions, with partial erections (sixth day), [5d] . ► Awoke at 6 A.M., with lewd dreams and pollution, with pain in end of urethra (second day), [5c] . ► Dreams of having the back part of the hair cut, [5c] . FEVER. ► Chilliness. ► General chilliness, with yawning (after nine hours), [5a] . ► Chilly, from 11 to 12 A.M. (second day), [5d] . ► Heat. ► Fever and sweat, from 12 to 2 P.M. (second day), [5d] . ► Warm sensation through the whole body, with flushes of heat and much perspiration, [3] . ► Sweat. ► A sourish sweating of the feet, with an odor like sole leather, like what he had years before, reappears, and is most between the toes (first day), [1] . CONDITIONS. ► Aggravation. ► ( Morning ), Dullness, etc., in head; headache, etc.; when rising, headache; after rising, pain in forehead ; pain in temple, etc.; pain in occiput; bad taste in mouth, etc.; mucus in though; when rising, dry throat ; when hawking, sore throat; one hour after rising, pain in stomach, etc.; on taking deep inspiration, soreness of region of stomach; at 5 o'clock, colic; expectoration of mucus ; sexual desire; backache; pains in limbs; pain in hip; soreness, etc., in body. ► ( Forenoon ), Head feels dull, etc.; headache; pain in temple; desire to urinate; pain in larynx; from 11 to 12 o'clock, chilliness. ► ( Noon ), Pain in head; headache, etc.; headache in occiput. ► ( Afternoon ), From 1 to 8 o'clock, pain in head; slight headache; rising of water; pain in limbs; from 12 to 2 o'clock, fever, etc. ► ( Evening ), Pain in eyelids; pain in ear; hawking of mucus; after supper, sour stomach, etc.; pain in abdomen ; pain in small of back; drowsiness. ► ( Night ), Pain in abdomen. ► ( Open air ), Headache in occiput; pains in eyes; lachrymation, etc. ► ( Bending forwards ), Pain in head. ► ( Cold air ), lachrymation, etc., in eyes; pain in teeth. ► ( Cold water ), Sensation in larynx. ► ( Contracting walls of abdomen ), Pain in umbilical region. ► ( After dinner ), Rising of water in mouth; pain in small of back, etc.; gaping, etc. ► ( After eating ), Especially after dinner, pain in stomach; pain in umbilical region. ► ( Deep inspiration ), Pain in region of spleen; st
Clinical: Constipation; Eye, affections of; Gonorrhœa; Hæmorrhages; Headache; Impotence; Liver disorders; Lumbago; Masturbation, effects of

Frequent sighing. On taking a deep inspiration, stitches in the chest, soreness in the stomach and pain in the spleen. Cough with soreness in the throat and rawness when hawking. Stitches in anterior part of larynx. Short hacking cough, with frequent eructation of a quantity of bright red blood, it feels as if it came from the larynx. Raising of much thick, tough mucus mixed with a considerable quantity of bright red blood; with the sensation of fulness and pressive pain in the larynx, accompanied by a sensation of scratching and rawness, with occasional burning pains, and a disposition to keep the jaws closed tightly; these sensations are increased by pressure, empty deglutition and cold water. Copious expectoration of frothy white mucus. Stitches in the arms (wrist-joints). Aching pain in the wrist-joints. Shooting in the thighs from the liver. Excessive weakness of the knees. Foot-sweat, mostly between the toes, smelling sour or like sole leather. Flushes of heat along the legs. Stitches in the legs. Bruised pain in all the limbs. Jerks in the limbs when falling asleep. Trembling of the limbs, esp. the legs, aching when sitting. Tingling sensation in feet as if asleep, sometimes like pricking of needles; circulation imperfect (Cob. muriat.).

keynotes.text: The most characteristic symptom of Cobalt is a very pronounced backache sitting; > rising up, walking, or lying down. Backache with seminal emissions. Other symptoms are: Frequent nocturnal emissions; with lewd dreams; With partial or no erections; impotence. Headache bending head forward (Clematis bending head backward). Pimples on the head and elsewhere; itching of the skin when warm in bed at night. Smarting, darting pains in eyes. Lachrymation in open air. Pain in hollow tooth, which feels too long and is sensitive to touch. Tongue thickly coated white; cracks across middle. No appetite for supper. Urine has strong pungent smell. Drowsiness; unrefreshing sleep. Sitting and stooping ; Lying down, rising from sitting, walking >. Most symptoms are morning. Cold air = lachrymation, and pain in teeth. Warmth of bed = itching all over. Jarring headache.

_raw: Compare:─Zinc. (in pain in back sitting); Agn. (impotency); Nux (effects of masturbation); Selen., Titan., Thallium. Dr. Jos. Anthal, of Budapesth, has discovered that Nitrate of Cobalt is a perfect antidote to Cyanide of Potassium, the two forming an insoluble compound.

mental_emotional.text: Great exhilaration of spirits. Great vivacity and rapid flow of thoughts (evening). More disposed to study. Feeling of great uneasiness, had to move about and could not keep still (with pain in the stomach and abdomen).

head.text: Dizziness during stool. Dulness in the head, with hard stools. Fulness in the head; feels too large, worse from stooping and bending forward. Pain in the forehead soon after rising. Bruised pain in the head. Headache as if it would burst, had to lie down, with sour stomach after supper. As if the top of the head would come off. When stepping, sensation as if the brain went up and down. Headache worse in the room, going off in the open air. Headache, with severe pain in the small of the back. Great itching in the hairy scalp, in the beard and under the chin.

eyes.text: Loss of vision on writing, dimness of sight; while reading the letters look blurred. The eyes smart in the light. On writing, dartings in the eye. Pain in the back part of the eyes, with headache. Darting pains in the eyes on coming to the bright sunshine. The eyes ache at night. Profuse lachrymation in the open air with water from the nose, with pain in the eyes in cold air. Sensation as if something (sand) were under the upper lid, obliging him to rub it.

ears.text: Stinging through the l. ear from the roof of the mouth.

nose.text: Putrid, sickish smell before the nose. Thin discharge from the nose, water from the nose. The nose feels obstructed.

face.text: A large, very painful boil on r. side of the chin. Peeling of the lips with soreness, they bleed easily. Disposition to keep the jaws tightly closed.

mouth_throat.text: Flat mucous taste in the mouth. Tongue coated white with cracks across the middle (morning). Stinging pain in the roof of the mouth. Constant secretion of water in the mouth with swallowing. Throat feels dry and raw. The throat is filled with white mucus. Soreness of the throat when hawking. Sensation of fulness in the throat from the stomach.

stomach_abdomen.text: Hiccough after eating, with soreness in the pit of the stomach. Belching of wind (in the morning), (during stool). Rising of bitter water, with pain in the stomach, afterwards dryness in the throat. Feeling in the stomach as if it contained undigested food. Fulness of the stomach as if it were filled with air. Soreness in the pit of the stomach caused by hiccough. Shooting pain in region of liver. Sharp pain in region of spleen, on taking a deep inspiration. Feeling of emptiness in abdomen and umbilicus. Colic (5 a.m.) followed by watery stool and tenesmus. Rumbling in the bowels (before stool). Fulness in the abdomen after a slight meal.

stool_rectum.text: Constant desire for stool while walking, worse when standing still, followed by diarrhœa. Soft, thin stool with severe colic in the lower bowels, followed by tenesmus, pain in the sphincter ani, and headache. Small, hard, dry stool. Feces like hazel-nuts, with dulness in head. Pressure in the rectum. Constant dropping of blood from the anus (no blood with the stool).

urinary.text: Increased secretion of pale urine, frequent micturition, after drinking coffee early in the morning. Frequent discharge of small quantities of urine. Scanty urine with a greasy pellicle and yellow, flocculent sediment and strong pungent smell. Smarting in the end of the urethra during micturition. Burning in the urethra. (Secondary) gonorrhœa, with a greenish discharge.

male.text: Frequent nocturnal seminal emissions with lewd dreams, waking him up from sleep; with headache. Impotence and nocturnal emissions without erections. Severe pain in r. testicle; > after passing urine. Yellow-brown spots on the genitals (and abdomen).

back.text: Pain between the shoulders, in the lumbar region and small of the back. Aching pain in the small of the back, worse when sitting, going off when rising, walking or lying down. Pain in the back (spine), increasing while sitting, better on walking or lying down. Backache with seminal emissions.

skin.text: Itching all over when getting warm in bed. Itching of the shoulders; outside of the knee.

sleep.text: Difficulty of falling asleep. When falling asleep jerks in the limbs. Wakens from lewd dreams and pollutions. Can do with less sleep than usual, wakefulness. Unrefreshing sleep.

fever_chill.text: Chilly from 11 to 12 a.m.; headache with nausea and languor from noon to 2 p.m.; followed by fever and perspiration. Chilliness with yawning from 4 to 5 p.m.; feels dull and weak with aversion to mental exertion. Flushes of heat with perspiration. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main.
